mapper.insert: INSERT INTO files (org_name, enc_name, dir_path, size, created_date, last_modified_date) VALUES (#{orgName}, #{encName}, #{dirPath}, #{size}, #{createdDate}, #{lastModifiedDate})
mapper.select: SELECT id, org_name AS orgName, enc_name AS encName, dir_path AS dirPath, size, created_date AS createdDate, last_modified_date AS lastModifiedDate FROM files WHERE id = #{id}
